calendar.matters:
Petition To Amend Order For Final Distribution To Remove Delores Harvey As A Beneficiary And To Declare Delores Harvey As Predeceasing The Decedent With No Surviving Issue
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Rasch appeared via zoom for Barbara DeVries (petitioner).
Azita Rahim appeared via zoom for the heirs.

The Court hears no objections. Petition to amend order for final distribution is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

Petition For Authority To Deposit Funds With County Treasurer
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Rasch appearing via zoom for Barbara DeVries (petitioner).
John Ruppel appearing via zoom for the heirs.

Discussion was held regarding holding Delores Harvey's shares with the San Francisco Treasurer, that a amended publication of a notice wherever Mrs. Harvey last resided, and that Mrs. Rasch to file a final distribution in a few weeks and a proof of publication. Petition for authority to deposit funds with county treasurer is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
